title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入危地马拉：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入瓜地馬拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Guatemala COGUANOR conformity requirements, CNEE grid-connection and energy-storage authorization requirements, AMM wholesale electricity market ancillary-services context, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, local fire-safety installation requirements (Bomberos Voluntarios / Municipales and building authority), UN 38.3 transport requirements for sea entry via Puerto Quetzal (Pacific) and Puerto Barrios / Santo Tomás de Castilla (Caribbean), and Guatemala's 60 Hz / 120–240 V grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, GB 44240-2024, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与危地马拉COGUANOR合格评定要求、CNEE并网及储能授权要求、AMM批发电力市场辅助服务背景、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、当地消防安全安装要求（志愿消防员/市政消防员及建筑主管机关）、UN 38.3运输要求（经太平洋危地马拉港或加勒比海圣托马斯德卡斯蒂利亚港入境）及危地马拉60 Hz / 120–240 V电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB 44240-2024和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與瓜地馬拉COGUANOR合格評定要求、CNEE併網及儲能授權要求、AMM批發電力市場輔助服務背景、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、當地消防安全安裝要求（志願消防員/市政消防員及建築主管機關）、UN 38.3運輸要求（經太平洋瓜地馬拉港或加勒比海聖托馬斯德卡斯蒂利亞港入境）及瓜地馬拉60 Hz / 120–240 V電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB 44240-2024和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, COGUANOR conformity scope determination, CNEE grid-connection or energy-storage authorization, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Guatemala COGUANOR technical norms, CNEE resolutions and technical specifications, AMM market rules, applicable fire-safety codes, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、COGUANOR合格评定范围裁定、CNEE并网或储能授权批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行危地马拉COGUANOR技术规范、CNEE决议及技术规格、AMM市场规则、适用消防安全规范、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、COGUANOR合格評定範圍裁定、CNEE併網或儲能授權批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行瓜地馬拉COGUANOR技術規範、CNEE決議及技術規格、AMM市場規則、適用消防安全規範、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Guatemala does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a dedicated IEC 62619 certification regime. BESS projects in Guatemala operate under CNEE (Comisión Nacional de Energía Eléctrica) authorization, COGUANOR conformity norms (which adopt IEC standards), AMM (Administrador del Mercado Mayorista) interconnection rules, and local building and fire-safety authority approvals. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Guatemala are: (1) Guatemala's grid operates at 60 Hz and 120/240 V single-phase or 120/208 V three-phase — fundamentally different from China's 50 Hz / 220/380 V; BESS power conversion systems (PCS) require complete firmware reconfiguration and must be validated for 60 Hz operation before any grid-connection application; (2) CNEE authorization is required for all grid-connected energy storage projects; specific technical requirements are defined in CNEE resolutions and distributor/transmission operator connection agreements; (3) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence is expected as the international technical baseline in project specifications; (4) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in CNEE or project-owner specifications; (5) COGUANOR conformity assessment may apply where Guatemala has adopted an IEC standard as a mandatory national norm (NGO); (6) local fire-safety installation approval from Bomberos Voluntarios or Bomberos Municipales and the relevant building authority; and (7) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions, with sea entry via Puerto Quetzal (Pacific) or Puerto Barrios / Santo Tomás de Castilla (Caribbean). Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, GB 44240-2024, and NB/T 42090-2016 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC or CNEE requirements in project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 危地马拉尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与专用IEC 62619认证制度相当。危地马拉的BESS项目在CNEE（国家电力能源委员会）授权、COGUANOR合格评定规范（采纳IEC标准）、AMM（批发电力市场管理者）互联规则及当地建筑和消防安全主管机关审批下运作。中国BESS出口危地马拉的实际差距包括：（1）危地马拉电网运行参数为60 Hz、单相120/240 V或三相120/208 V——与中国50 Hz / 220/380 V存在根本性差异；BESS储能变流器（PCS）须完全重新配置固件，并须在任何并网申请前完成60 Hz运行验证；（2）所有并网储能项目须取得CNEE授权；具体技术要求在CNEE决议及配电/输电运营商并网协议中规定；（3）电芯和模组安全方面，IEC 62619证据是项目规格中预期的国际技术基准；（4）CNEE或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（5）在危地马拉已将IEC标准采纳为强制性国家规范（NGO）的情况下，COGUANOR合格评定可能适用；（6）来自志愿消防员或市政消防员及相关建筑主管机关的当地消防安全安装审批；（7）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件，经太平洋危地马拉港或加勒比海巴里奥斯港/圣托马斯德卡斯蒂利亚港海运入境。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB 44240-2024和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC或CNEE要求的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 瓜地馬拉尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與專用IEC 62619認證制度相當。瓜地馬拉的BESS項目在CNEE（國家電力能源委員會）授權、COGUANOR合格評定規範（採納IEC標準）、AMM（批發電力市場管理者）互聯規則及當地建築和消防安全主管機關審批下運作。中國BESS出口瓜地馬拉的實際差距包括：（1）瓜地馬拉電網運行參數為60 Hz、單相120/240 V或三相120/208 V——與中國50 Hz / 220/380 V存在根本性差異；BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須完全重新配置韌體，並須在任何併網申請前完成60 Hz運行驗證；（2）所有併網儲能項目須取得CNEE授權；具體技術要求在CNEE決議及配電/輸電運營商併網協議中規定；（3）電芯和模組安全方面，IEC 62619證據是項目規格中預期的國際技術基準；（4）CNEE或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（5）在瓜地馬拉已將IEC標準採納為強制性國家規範（NGO）的情況下，COGUANOR合格評定可能適用；（6）來自志願消防員或市政消防員及相關建築主管機關的當地消防安全安裝審批；（7）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件，經太平洋瓜地馬拉港或加勒比海巴里奧斯港/聖托馬斯德卡斯蒂利亞港海運入境。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB 44240-2024和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC或CNEE要求的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
